details.test: Task 1: Book 60-minute career change session next week under $120 with a top-rated coach
Task 2: Save leadership coaching program with lowest price per session under $800
Task 3: Schedule free 30-minute discovery call this month (adapted to available slots)
Task 4: Build learning plan with impostor syndrome articles (videos adapted to data)
Task 5: Register for cheapest evening interview skills workshop this month (>=3 hours)
Task 6: Request corporate coaching proposal for 200–500 employees with $5000 budget
Task 7: Complete readiness assessment and save first two recommended 1:1 packages
Task 8: Schedule three 45-minute (or closest) leadership sessions as multi-session booking within $450
Task 9: Purchase $300 career & leadership coaching gift card and checkout
